reasoning_model_1: The audio generated by Model 1 is critically flawed regarding Content Accuracy. It only speaks the first phrase '你听说了吗？' and completely omits the remainder of the required script ('我们公司要组织一次团建活动去郊外野餐！这可是个难得的机会，可以和大家放松一下，还能亲近大自然！'). Due to this severe incompletion, the model fails to convey the full message. According to the Detailed Scoring Standard, a completely incorrect voice content or major omission results in a score of 0, regardless of the pitch performance on the fragment.
reasoning_model_2: Model 2 generates the complete text script with perfect Content Accuracy, including no mispronunciations or omissions. Regarding the 'High Pitch' (音高) dimension, the model successfully elevates the fundamental frequency of the voice throughout the entire clip (0:00-end). The higher pitch effectively mimics an excited or enthusiastic tone suitable for sharing good news about a team-building event. The prosody remains natural and fluent despite the shift in register, avoiding a mechanical or straining sound. The feature control is vivid and spot-on.
model_comparison: There is a significant difference in performance between the two models. Model 1 failed to complete the generation task, resulting in a truncated audio file that is unusable. Model 2 provided a complete, high-quality audio generation that accurately followed both the content script and the paralinguistic instruction to use a high pitch. Therefore, Model 2 is the superior model.
